# Creative Brief and Asset Factory

## Principle

Do not let AI generate random creatives. Make it generate from briefs.

## Creative brief schema

```json
{
  "brief_id": "BRIEF-2026-001",
  "product": "SupportFlow AI",
  "buyer_state": "problem_aware",
  "persona": "Head of Support at B2B SaaS",
  "channel": "LinkedIn",
  "format": "single image",
  "angle": "support chaos becomes developer-ready tickets",
  "claim_ids": ["CLM-001"],
  "visual_metaphor": "messy inbox transformed into clean ticket fields",
  "copy_style": "specific, calm, technical, proof-oriented",
  "must_include": ["AI drafts", "human review", "structured fields"],
  "must_avoid": ["guaranteed", "fully automated", "replace team"],
  "cta": "Watch the 90-second workflow",
  "landing_page": "/demo/support-ticket-drafts"
}
```

## Asset types

### Static image

Use for:

- problem recognition,
- before/after workflows,
- proof screenshots,
- quote cards,
- comparison tables,
- objection-specific retargeting.

### Carousel

Use for:

- step-by-step explanation,
- objection sequence,
- mini case study,
- implementation path.

### Short video

Use for:

- visible product transformation,
- founder demo,
- screen recording,
- customer workflow.

### Text-only ad

Use for:

- search,
- B2B LinkedIn thought/point-of-view,
- fast angle testing.

## Asset quality checklist

- One idea only.
- Specific buyer situation.
- Verifiable claim.
- Clear next step.
- No vague superlatives.
- No fake urgency.
- No hidden terms.
- No unsupported numerical claim.
- Landing page matches ad promise.

## Creative fatigue triggers

Refresh when:

- frequency rises above channel threshold,
- CTR drops while impressions remain stable,
- conversion rate drops after stable traffic quality,
- comments indicate confusion,
- policy disapprovals increase,
- the same angle stops producing activated users.

## Mindset

Creative is not decoration. It is compressed proof.
